notFoundInMarketplace: Skill not found in the marketplace
filesNotAvailable: Skill files are not available on the server
sourceFilesNotAvailable: Source skill files are not available on the server
notInstalledFromMarketplace: This skill was not installed from the marketplace and has no source to sync from
sourceNoLongerAvailable: The source skill is no longer available in the marketplace (removed or not approved)
notFoundOrNotOwned: Skill "{id}" not found or not owned by you
notReadyForPublish: The skill must have status "ready" to be published (current: "{status}")
teamIdRequired: teamId is required when scope is "team".
onlyAdminOrTeamOwnerCanPublish: Only admin or team owner can publish to the team.
onlyOrgSkillsCanBeApproved: Only org skills can be approved
alreadyAssignedToProject: Skill already assigned to this project
noPermissionToRemoveAssignment: You do not have permission to remove this assignment
notFoundOrNotReady: Skill "{id}" not found or not in "ready" state
scriptNotFoundForInvoke: Script "{filename}" not found in skill "{name}". Available scripts: {available}
scriptIsDaemon: Script "{filename}" is a daemon and cannot be invoked directly. Use POST /api/skills/:id/daemon to start it.
configKeyNotDeclared: Key "{key}" is not declared in the skill configuration. Available keys: {available}
invalidZip: Invalid file: not a readable ZIP archive
missingSkillMd: The package must contain a "SKILL.md" file at the root
compileNoScripts: No executable scripts found in the skill bundle.
compileProposalFailed: The AI did not produce a valid proposal. Try again or edit manually.
skillMdNotFound: SKILL.md not found for this skill.
frontmatterMissing: SKILL.md must start with a YAML frontmatter (--- … ---) including at least "name" and "description"
frontmatterInvalid: SKILL.md frontmatter is not valid YAML: {message}
invalidYaml: SKILL.md frontmatter is not valid YAML: {message}
yamlNameInvalid: SKILL.md: invalid name "{name}". Use only lowercase letters, digits and hyphens (e.g. "data-analyzer").
yamlDescriptionRequired: SKILL.md: the "description" field is required and cannot be empty
yamlScriptFilenameRequired: SKILL.md: every script must have a "filename" field
yamlScriptLanguageUnsupported: SKILL.md: language "{language}" not supported. Use "python", "javascript" or "node".
yamlScriptPathUnsafe: SKILL.md: filename "{filename}" contains an unsafe path
yamlScriptModeUnsupported: SKILL.md: mode "{mode}" not supported for "{filename}". Use "task", "daemon" or "info".
yamlDaemonJsNotAllowed: SKILL.md: daemon script "{filename}" cannot use language "javascript" (isolated-vm). Use "python" or "node".
zipNameMismatch: The skill name in the ZIP ("{zipName}") does not match the current skill ("{skillName}")
packagePathNotAvailable: Package path not available for this skill
docsNotFound: No documentation file found (SKILL.md or README.md)
nameAlreadyOwnedByUser: You already have a skill named "{name}"
nameConflictOrg: An org skill named "{name}" already exists. Org names must be globally unique.
nameConflictTeam: A team skill named "{name}" already exists.
onlyZipAccepted: Only ZIP files are accepted for skills
onlyOwnerCanExecute: Only the owner can execute scripts manually
checksumMismatch: Checksum mismatch (expected {expected}…, got {actual}…): package tampered or different from the published version.
checksumMissingStrict: Installation blocked: the skill does not declare a checksum (strict mode).
checksumMissingAdminOnly: The skill does not declare an integrity checksum: only an administrator can install it.
registryUnreachable: The public registry is not reachable: {message}. Check SKILLS_REGISTRY_URL and the server network connection.
downloadDomainNotAllowed: Download not allowed from domain "{hostname}". Allowed domains: {allowed}. Add more with SKILLS_REGISTRY_ALLOWED_DOMAINS.
internalConfigNotObject: The "config" field must be a key-value object
